case_for: Mostert has flashed high-ceiling weeks (16.0, 11.8) when he sees enough volume/goal-line work in Miami's offense, showing the upside exists if usage returns.
case_against: The trend is sharply negative with a -0.2 pt week 11 finish and a pregame consensus projection of essentially zero, suggesting a diminished role, possible injury/committee situation, or tough matchup.
